item.title: How much weight can a fly actually lift?
item.description: In this video I catch a fly and tie a string to it in order to measure how much weight it can lift! First I slow down their metabolism by cooling them down then I tie a string around it and attach duct tape weights to it in order to see how much it can lift! I was surprised how much it could lift!

media:content.media:title: How much weight can a fly actually lift?
media:content.media:description: In this video I catch a fly and tie a string to it in order to measure how much weight it can lift! First I slow down their metabolism by cooling them down then I tie a string around it and attach duct tape weights to it in order to see how much it can lift! I was surprised how much it could lift!

item.title: How are black apples made?
item.description: Disclaimer: Do not try anything you see me do in this video. Ammonia is very toxic and very dangerous to work with.

item.title: Black plasma melts steel
item.description: In this video I take the black fire experiment to the next level to create black plasma.

item.title: 1 giant magnet vs. 1,000 small magnets
item.description: In this video I see what happens when I let 1 giant monster neodymium magnet collide with 1,000 tiny neodymium magnets! Then I test what happens when I try to hold them in my hand next to the giant neodymium magnet!

media:content.media:title: 1 giant magnet vs. 1,000 small magnets
media:content.media:description: In this video I see what happens when I let 1 giant monster neodymium magnet collide with 1,000 tiny neodymium magnets! Then I test what happens when I try to hold them in my hand next to the giant neodymium magnet!
